method: For each 9:30-9:45 candle, count 15m bars from 9:45 until first wick-back to H or L. ALL counters (per-bucket and totalDays) committed at the same bar (15:45 RTH close) for denominator consistency.
v1_bug_note: Original v1 results had per-bucket counters firing during forward bars but totalDays gated at 15:45, producing percentages inflated by ~3pp because bucket sums (232) exceeded totalDays (223). v2 fix: per-day flag captured during forward bars, all counters committed together at 15:45.

summary.interpretation: 91% of 9:30 candles get wicked back to within the very next 15-min bar (9:45-10:00). Mean time to retest, conditional on a hit happening, is ~17 minutes.
